title: Find and restore archived items?
excerpt: I have archived a few individual items. Where can I find them and how can I restore them?

posts.author: koppitz (Ralph Koppitz)
posts.cookedHtml: I have archived a few individual items. Where can I find them and how can I restore them?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @koppitz, I hope the link @JohnW posted was helpful! It describes how you can go to the three-dot menu in your board, click into Board settings >> Archived history. There you can find and restore your items

image1188×1146 145 KB

posts.author: koppitz (Ralph Koppitz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks, already solved it
